title: Congratulations to Zhangli Zhou (first author) on having the paper "Dual Reactive Planning for Heterogeneous Robots With Evolving Capabilities in Unknown Environments" accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L).
summary: Dual Reactive Planning for Heterogeneous Robots With Evolving Capabilities in Unknown Environments has been accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L).
